title: Missing results for index lookup
description:
### What happens?

DuckDB exhibits non-deterministic behavior when using an index for lookups. Originally reported by @marci543.

### To Reproduce

[comment.parquet.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22605655/comment.parquet.zip)

```sql
CREATE TABLE comment AS SELECT id, replyOf FROM 'comment.parquet';
CREATE INDEX idx_comment_replyOf ON comment(replyOf);
SELECT id FROM comment WHERE replyOf = 687195512455;
```

Running this multiple times changes between the following. Usually only a few executions are required to see both.
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ      id      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    uint64    в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 687195512457 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 687195512463 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ   id   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ uint64 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 0 rows в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

This is a multi-threading issue as `SET threads = 1;` makes the result correct (same as without an index):

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ      id      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ    uint64    в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ 687195512457 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 687195512463 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 687195512456 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ 687195512462 в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

### OS:

Linux/macOS

### DuckDB Version:

1.3.2, 1.4.0, nightly

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

### Full Name:

Gabor Szarnyas

### Affiliation:

DuckDB Labs

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have not tested with any build

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

Yes

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have

SELECT id FROM comment WHERE replyOf = 687195512455;
key_bug_features: Non-deterministic index lookup behavior in multi-threading
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE user_data (user_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_name VARCHAR, user_age INTEGER, user_email VARCHAR);
SELECT user_id FROM user_data WHERE user_email IS NULL OR user_age > 20;
